canonical_definition: A synthetic dataset of program-generated, elementary-school level math reasoning problems with step-by-step solutions, designed to be controllable and verifiable.
papers: Physics of Language Models: Part 2.1, Grade-School Math and the Hidden Reasoning Process
Physics of Language Models: Part 2.2, How to Learn From Mistakes on Grade-School Math Problems
